summary.what_happened: Appointment booking latency and errors rose sharply.
summary.customer_impact: Patients experience slow or failed appointment booking.

incident_window.rule: alert.triggered_at (2026-06-01T14:35:00+00:00) minus 30m lookback; deviated series not recovered -> ongoing

severity.explanation: error rate 4.8% and p95 latency 7x baseline on the booking flow

timeline.description: deploy 2026.05.30-0915 on notifications-service: Reminder template copy update
deploy 2026.06.01-1420 on booking-service: Enable payment eligibility enrichment in the booking flow (gated by feature flag payment_enrichment)

evidence.interpretation: booking-service deploy 2026.06.01-1420 landed 11 minutes before latency crossed 2x baseline; timing aligned
eligibility retries escalate to exhaustion starting 14:29
p95 latency first crossed 2x baseline at 14:30
notifications-service stayed at baseline throughout the window
runbook failure mode 'retry amplification after payment changes' matches observed retry warnings
eligibility_query dominates degraded traces (2150ms of 3180ms root)

hypotheses.title: Deploy-driven eligibility retries saturating appointments-db
hypotheses.statement: The 14:20 booking-service deploy enabled payment eligibility enrichment whose slow queries and unbounded-looking retries saturated appointments-db, consistent with the latency and error escalation from 14:25.
assumptions: telemetry in the package is complete for the window
recommended_checks: compare booking error rates before and after release 2026.06.01-1420
inspect payment eligibility retry bounds and backoff

missing_data.description: runbook_investigator: runbook does not cover queue consumer scaling
missing_data.impact: flagged by an investigator as limiting its conclusions

recommended_next_steps.description: compare booking error rates before and after release 2026.06.01-1420
inspect payment eligibility retry bounds and backoff
Investigate open question: runbook_investigator: runbook does not cover queue consumer scaling

safe_mitigation_options.rationale: the runbook documents it as a verified safe fallback

communication_drafts.internal_update: SEV-2: appointment booking degraded. No remediation has been executed; mitigation options await human approval.
